assignments.name: code_context

parameters.text:
Create a code assistance proposal for the following development context.

The proposal must support:
- code implementation
- refactoring if needed
- TDD-oriented development
- Git workflow
- human validation before any real change

Return only valid JSON with this exact structure:

{
  "wf03_code_assistance": {
    "implementation_strategy": "",
    "refactoring_recommendations": [],
    "files_to_create": [],
    "files_to_modify": [],
    "pseudo_code": "",
    "patch_proposal": "",
    "unit_test_suggestions": [],
    "integration_test_suggestions": [],
    "git_actions": {
      "suggested_branch_name": "",
      "commit_message": "",
      "pull_request_title": "",
      "pull_request_description": ""
    },
    "risks": [],
    "requires_human_approval": true,
    "ready_for_qa": true
  }
}

Code context:
{{$json.code_context}}

options.systemMessage:
You are a senior full-stack developer working in an AI workflow for developers.

Your role is to propose an implementation plan and code assistance based on a validated technical breakdown.

You must not claim that changes were applied.
You must not merge, deploy, or modify production code.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown. No explanation outside JSON.

assignments.name: wf03_code_assistance
assignments.value: ={{ {   implementation_strategy: "Code assistance cannot be produced because the technical breakdown is not ready.",   refactoring_recommendations: [],   files_to_create: [],   files_to_modify: [],   pseudo_code: "",   patch_proposal: "",   unit_test_suggestions: [],   integration_test_suggestions: [],   git_actions: {     suggested_branch_name: "",     commit_message: "",     pull_request_title: "",     pull_request_description: ""   },   risks: [     "Technical breakdown is incomplete or blocked in WF02."   ],   requires_human_approval: true,   ready_for_qa: false } }}
